auth.label: API Key
auth.description: urlscan.io API key sent with the API-Key header. Create an account and manage API keys from the user area.

actions.name: get_result
actions.description: Retrieve the JSON result for a completed urlscan.io scan.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for retrieving a scan result.

uuid.description: Unique scan UUID used for the lookup.

result.description: A raw JSON object returned by urlscan.io.

outputSchema.description: Normalized scan result returned by urlscan.io.

actions.name: search_scans
actions.description: Search urlscan.io scans with the documented search query syntax.

query.description: Search query using urlscan.io search syntax, for example "domain:example.com".

size.description: Maximum number of results to return.

items.description: One sort value returned by urlscan.io.

anyOf.description: Sort values from a urlscan.io search result.

searchAfter.description: Pagination cursor from the sort values of the last result in the previous page.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for searching urlscan.io scans.

items.description: A raw JSON object returned by urlscan.io.

results.description: Raw JSON objects returned by urlscan.io.

total.description: Total matching scan count reported by urlscan.io.

hasMore.description: Whether urlscan.io reports that older results are available.

items.description: One sort value returned by urlscan.io.

nextSearchAfter.description: Sort values from a urlscan.io search result.

raw.description: A raw JSON object returned by urlscan.io.

outputSchema.description: Normalized search response returned by urlscan.io.

actions.name: submit_scan
actions.description: Submit a URL to urlscan.io for scanning.

visibility.description: Visibility level for the submitted scan.

items.description: One tag to add to the scan.

tags.description: User-defined tags to annotate the scan.

customagent.description: Custom User-Agent string to use for the scan.

referer.description: Custom HTTP referer to use for the scan.

overrideSafety.description: Whether to disable URL reclassification when urlscan.io detects potential PII.

country.description: Two-letter ISO-3166-1 alpha-2 country code for the scan location.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for submitting a URL scan.

message.description: Submission status message returned by urlscan.io.

uuid.description: Unique scan UUID assigned by urlscan.io.

resultUrl.description: Browser result URL for the submitted scan.

apiUrl.description: Result API URL for the submitted scan.

visibility.description: Visibility level applied to the submitted scan.

country.description: Country code used for the scan.

options.description: A raw JSON object returned by urlscan.io.

outputSchema.description: Normalized submission response returned by urlscan.io.
